notes: This experiment package is labeled as a public-materials highest-fidelity replication, not as an exact recovery of the original Ngene design or respondent microdata.
The pooled design uses the published SD and MD attribute level tables, all seven alternatives, the published pooled Table 4 target coefficients, and the Appendix A utility-function structure.

The original Ngene blocks are unavailable in the public paper. The eight-block design file is therefore reconstructed deterministically from the published attribute levels and marked as inferred_from_public at the task-combination level.
Personas are grounded only in public Table 1 observables plus one explicit external assumption for MaaS subscription.
The estimator is Biogeme only; torch-based mixed-logit estimation is intentionally not part of this v7 line.

For the full v7 run, the AI-side settings follow v6 closely, while the Biogeme draw count is reduced to 8 so that the pooled 67-parameter panel mixed-logit model remains tractable on the local machine.
The active Biogeme optimizer is the package's scipy backend.
